use_cases: Showcasing professional service offerings on agency or portfolio websites
Displaying a grid of core competencies for creative studios
Presenting service packages on SaaS landing pages
Building a services section for freelance developer portfolios
Creating a modular services showcase for marketing agencies
ai_summary: A minimalist services section component displaying four service offerings (Web Development, Creative Design, Branding, Product Design) in a responsive card grid layout. Built with Inter typography, dark mode support, and clean flat design suitable for agency or portfolio websites. Features centered header text with maximum width container for professional presentation.
